name: hatch-pet-plus
description: Create custom animated Codex pets from art, references, or a concept

interface.longDescription: Build a Codex-compatible animated pet from character art, generated images, or just a concept. Generates the base sprite, all 9 animation rows, and the 16 look directions, then assembles, despills, validates and packages a v2 8x11 spritesheet ready to drop into ~/.codex/pets/. Includes hardened chroma despilling and gaze-direction guidance learned the hard way.
defaultPrompt: Make me a custom Codex pet: a tiny friendly flame-tailed lizard
Turn this character art into a Codex pet
Hatch a pet mascot for my company
